Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-25-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant SOS Trucking Services LLC DBA SOS Trucking Services.

Dept: 505: Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 10:07:50 a.m. and concluding 10:20:48 a.m. (D505)

Eric Jun, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Creditor Adjustment Bureau, Inc.
Defendant SOS Trucking Services LLC DBA SOS Trucking Services not appearing.
Benjamin Seeman, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Counsel to offer proof to the request of 18% interest.
18% interest on damages is denied by the Court. The court grants 10%.
Counsel examines witness. Witness testifies.
Plaintiff submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: contract
Exhibit 2: Invoices
Exhibit 4: Agreement

Good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:
Damages $66,068.70
Interest at 10% 6,027.64
Costs $503.09
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Total Judgment $75,424.43

Amended proposed judgment to be submitted for approval and signature of the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
